task_title: Cross-boundary verification across all module interfaces

findings.title: chunk_size default inconsistent: RAGConfig=256, engine_factory=512, GUI=512
findings.problem: Three different chunk_size defaults depending on code path: RAGConfig.__init__ uses 256, engine_factory uses 512, GUI passes 512 from settings. This means the same documents get different chunking depending on how the engine is created (CLI vs GUI vs API).
findings.fix: Unify default to one value across all three locations.
findings.evidence: RAGConfig:46 chunk_size=256. engine_factory:124,187 chunk_size=512. app_gui.py:155,169 chunk_size=512.

findings.title: retrieval_window default inconsistent: RAGConfig=0, engine_factory=1
findings.problem: RAGConfig defaults retrieval_window=0 but engine_factory defaults to 1. Window expansion behavior differs by code path.

findings.title: GUI bypasses engine_factory — missing advanced config fields
findings.problem: GUI directly constructs RAGConfig+RAGEngine instead of using engine_factory.create_engine_from_settings(). This means GUI users never get retrieval_window, reranking_enabled, reranker_model, or query_transformation_enabled from their settings — these fields always use RAGConfig defaults.

findings.title: SmartLLM docstring lists wrong backend priority order
findings.problem: SmartLLM docstring says 'OpenVINO first, then GGUF' but code does GGUF first.

findings.title: BM25 index mutations lack synchronization
findings.problem: VectorStore.bm25_index is mutated by add_chunks, delete_document without locks. Multi-threaded access (from api_server concurrent requests) could corrupt state.

findings.title: RAGConfig.from_dict max_tokens default (512) differs from __init__ (1024)
findings.problem: Settings loaded via from_dict use max_tokens=512 by default, but direct construction uses 1024.

findings.title: ingest_file response discards time_seconds field
findings.problem: rag_engine.ingest_file() returns time_seconds but /ingest/file endpoint doesn't include it in the response.

positive_findings: Chunk ID format consistent across all consumers
API query interface matches engine interface correctly
Circular import pattern between rag_engine and engine_factory is safe
